---
title: "Mon rapport"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Un agent de l'Insee"
output: html_document
params:
  codeDpt: "01"
---
  
```{r config, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning=FALSE,
                      message=FALSE,
                      error = TRUE,
                      fig.align = "center",
                      out = '75%')
```

```{r load-packages}
library(data.table)
```

```{r importData}
cog_com_2019 <- data.table::as.data.table(duckdb::sql_query("
  INSTALL httpfs;
  LOAD httpfs;
  SELECT * FROM 'https://minio.lab.sspcloud.fr/projet-formation/diffusion/utilitR/doremifasoldata/cog_com_2019.parquet'
"))
```

```{r selectData}
monDpt <- cog_com_2019[dep %in% params$codeDpt]
```

Voici un rapport paramétré très intéressant. Il porte sur le département `r params$codeDpt`.

```{r tableData}
table(monDpt$dep)
```
